message:
feat(brenner-loop): implement EvidenceEntry data model (bead njjo.1)

Create comprehensive evidence tracking system:
- TestType enum with 8 test categories
- EvidenceResult type (supports/challenges/inconclusive)
- DiscriminativePower scale (1-5)
- TestDescription embedded interface
- Full EvidenceEntry interface with predictions, results, confidence tracking
- Validation functions with errors and warnings
- Type guards (isTestType, isEvidenceResult, isEvidenceEntry, etc.)
- Factory functions (generateEvidenceId, createEvidenceEntry)
- Utility functions (calculateConfidenceDelta, summarizeEvidenceResult)

This implements bead brenner_bot-njjo.1 and unblocks:
- njjo.2: Confidence Update Algorithm
- njjo.3: Evidence Recording UI
- nu8g.1: Research Brief Template
- an1n.4: Robustness Score Calculation
- njjo.4: Evidence Timeline Visualization
- njjo.5: Test Queue Feature

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -417,3 +417,75 @@ export {
   formatLockTimestamp,
   getShortHash,
 } from "./prediction-lock";
+
+// ============================================================================
+// Evidence Ledger (bead njjo.1)
+// ============================================================================
+
+export type {
+  // Core types
+  TestType,
+  EvidenceResult,
+  DiscriminativePower,
+  TestDescription,
+
+  // Main interface (comprehensive version)
+  EvidenceEntry as FullEvidenceEntry,
+
+  // Validation types
+  EvidenceValidationResult,
+  EvidenceValidationError,
+  EvidenceValidationWarning,
+  EvidenceValidationErrorCode,
+  EvidenceValidationWarningCode,
+} from "./evidence";
+
+export {
+  // Constants
+  TEST_TYPE_LABELS,
+  DISCRIMINATIVE_POWER_LABELS,
+
+  // Type guards
+  isTestType,
+  isEvidenceResult,
+  isDiscriminativePower,
+  isTestDescription,
+  isEvidenceEntry,
+
+  // Validation
+  validateEvidenceEntry,
+
+  // Factory functions
+  generateEvidenceId,
+  createEvidenceEntry,
+
+  // Utility functions
+  calculateConfidenceDelta,
+  summarizeEvidenceResult,
+  getResultColor,
+} from "./evidence";
+
+// ============================================================================
+// Multi-Agent Tribunal System (bead xlk2.1)
+// ============================================================================
+
+export type {
+  // Agent types
+  TribunalAgentRole,
+  TribunalAgentConfig,
+} from "./agents";
+
+export {
+  // Agent configurations
+  TRIBUNAL_AGENTS,
+  TRIBUNAL_ORDER,
+
+  // Agent helpers
+  getTribunalAgentsInOrder,
+  getAgentConfig,
+  loadPrompt,
+  clearPromptCache,
+
+  // Type guards
+  isTribunalAgentRole,
+} from "./agents";
